text  
the line integral of the function $ f(z) = e^{z^2} $ along the boundary of the circle $ |z| = R $ is calculated using contour integration. the integral value is determined by evaluating the function at the boundary and applying the residue theorem. the result shows that the integral is equal to $ 2\pi i \times $ the residue of the function at the singular points inside the circle. the spiritual significance of this result is that it reflects the cyclical nature of energy flow in the sacred space. the average energy density over the entire area of the circle is found by integrating the real part of $ f(z) $ in polar coordinates. this calculation reveals that the energy density is distributed evenly across the circle, suggesting a balanced spiritual energy. the results of the mathematical analysis are linked to the shaman's belief in the harmony of the universe.  
P.S. the concept of energy flow is central to the shaman's rituals, and the mathematical findings support the spiritual interpretation of the ritual's purpose. the engineer of the ritual uses the complex function to understand the energy dynamics within the sacred space. the engineer of the ritual also uses the integral value to validate the spiritual significance of the ritual's structure.  

text  
the energy density is calculated by integrating the real part of $ f(z) $ over the area of the circle. this involves converting the complex function into polar coordinates and performing the integration. the result shows that the energy density is proportional to the radius squared, indicating a spreading of energy across the circle. the spiritual significance of this finding is that it aligns with the shaman's belief in the expansion of energy through the sacred space. the ritual's design is based on the mathematical principles of energy flow and distribution. the results of the integration are used to guide the shaman in interpreting the ritual's effects. the energy density is spread evenly, reflecting the balance of the ritual's components. the shaman attributes this spreading to the natural flow of energy in the sacred space.  
P.S. the spread of energy is a key aspect of the ritual's success, and the mathematical model supports the shaman's spiritual understanding of the ritual's purpose. the engineer of the ritual uses the model to predict the energy distribution, ensuring the ritual's effectiveness. the engineer of the ritual also uses the model to interpret the ritual's outcomes, reinforcing the connection between mathematics and spirituality.
